mapper.select: SELECT H.HO_NO, U.APT_CMPLEX_NO, U.DONG_NO, U.DONG_NM, H.HO, U.DONG_NM || '동 ' || H.HO || '호' AS DISPLAY_DONG_HO FROM HSHLD_HEAD HH JOIN APT_DETAIL H ON HH.HO_NO = H.HO_NO JOIN APT_UNIT U ON H.DONG_NO = U.DONG_NO WHERE HH.USER_NO = #{userNo} ORDER BY U.DONG_NM, H.HO

SELECT B.BILL_NO, B.HO_NO, B.BILL_YM, B.BILL_PBLANC_DT, B.BILL_TOT_AMT, B.DUE_DT, B.PYMT_STTS_CD, B.PYMT_DT, B.PYMT_AMT, B.LATE_FEE_RT, B.LATE_FEE_AMT,
U.APT_CMPLEX_NO, U.DONG_NO, U.DONG_NM, H.HO, U.DONG_NM || '동 ' || H.HO || '호' AS DISPLAY_DONG_HO,
C.CODE_NAME AS PYMT_STTS_NM, C.CODE_CONTENT AS PYMT_STTS_CONTENT
FROM BILL B JOIN APT_DETAIL H ON B.HO_NO = H.HO_NO JOIN APT_UNIT U ON H.DONG_NO = U.DONG_NO JOIN HSHLD_HEAD HH ON HH.HO_NO = B.HO_NO LEFT JOIN COMMON_CODE C ON C.GROUP_CODE_NO = 'PAY_ST' AND C.CODE_NO_CD = B.PYMT_STTS_CD AND C.USE_YN = 'Y' WHERE HH.USER_NO = #{userNo} AND B.BILL_NO = #{billNo}

SELECT B.BILL_NO, B.HO_NO, B.BILL_YM, B.BILL_PBLANC_DT, B.BILL_TOT_AMT, B.DUE_DT, B.PYMT_STTS_CD, B.PYMT_DT, B.PYMT_AMT, B.LATE_FEE_RT, B.LATE_FEE_AMT,
H.DONG_NO, H.HO, U.DONG_NM, U.APT_CMPLEX_NO, U.DONG_NM || '동 ' || H.HO || '호' AS DISPLAY_DONG_HO,
C.CODE_NAME AS PYMT_STTS_NM, C.CODE_CONTENT AS PYMT_STTS_CONTENT
FROM BILL B JOIN APT_DETAIL H ON B.HO_NO = H.HO_NO JOIN APT_UNIT U ON H.DONG_NO = U.DONG_NO LEFT JOIN COMMON_CODE C ON C.GROUP_CODE_NO = 'PAY_ST' AND C.CODE_NO_CD = B.PYMT_STTS_CD AND C.USE_YN = 'Y'
WHERE B.HO_NO = #{hoNo} AND SUBSTR(B.BILL_YM, 1, 4) = #{billYear}
ORDER BY B.BILL_YM DESC

SELECT BD.BILL_DETAIL_NO, BD.BILL_NO, BD.BILL_ITEM_CD, BD.BILL_ITEM_AMT, BD.ATCH_FILE_ID,
C.CODE_NAME AS BILL_ITEM_NM, C.CODE_CONTENT AS BILL_ITEM_CONTENT
FROM BILL_DETAIL BD LEFT JOIN COMMON_CODE C ON C.GROUP_CODE_NO = 'EXPN_CD' AND C.CODE_NO_CD = BD.BILL_ITEM_CD AND C.USE_YN = 'Y' WHERE BD.BILL_NO = #{billNo} ORDER BY C.SORT_ORDER, BD.BILL_ITEM_CD
